reviews.title: No consideration for unexpected circumstances
reviews.text:
We had a booking for 3 rooms in five people. Because of a death in the family 3 people wouldn't be able to join the stay anymore. 
On these unexpected circumstances we requested for a cancellation or change in the booking. Even with proof they did not make themselves available to any flexibility and 2 of the rooms went unused.
All other hotels and airlines were very understanding of the situation and cancelled the reservation or provided vouchers free of charge.
This was the only business that did not care at all about the situation. Maybe they never went through a similar situation and because of that they can't sympathize with my group situation.
I wouldn't recommend a stay here as they do not have the minimum requirements of human touch that so many other businesses in Japan and other countries do.

reviews.title: A dishonest hotel
reviews.text:
I booked a room via Agoda. The room they provided was super smelly, and I called and requested for a change. And I was informed they were fully booking and the other room was only available for next 2 days. So when I went to the front desk to double confirm I shall get another room in next 2 days, the front desk staff told me "the booking is a standard smoking room and cannot be amended or modified". I wrote to Agoda to clarify. And there is no such thing, my room type was "Standard with 1 Double Bed Hot Deal No Refund".

Even worse, the restaurant food was horrible as well.

reviews.text:
I booked standard double and expected a small room, but the real room was much smaller than I would have expected...I am sure you can book a lot larger room in downtown with the same price. 

Okies, if the room is comfortable then I don't mind the size of it, but it isn't unfortunately. The duvet sheet was not dried up thoroughly so it smelled. I mean the housekeeping staff should have smelled that and changed it...so disappointing. I didn't request to change to another room or to ask them to change the duvet sheet for us as it was quite late already when we noticed that. We were out for shopping after checking in in the afternoon. 

Front desk staff no smile at all, this needs improvement for sure...

reviews.title: not meet expectation
reviews.text:
Unfortunately, this hotel did not meet expectations. The nightly rate is higher than comparable properties in Okinawa that offer superior views, yet the rooms are notably small. In addition, the location makes it difficult to travel conveniently to nearby attractions or public transport.

Given the price, limited space, and challenging accessibility, I would hesitate to recommend this hotel; more satisfying and cost-effective options are available in the area.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 
Greetings from Mercure Okinawa Naha. 
Thank you for choosing us during your stay in Naha. 

We are sorry if your expectations have not been fulfilled during your stay. The rates are variable from the occupancy on that day : if the room is taken late, the rates are more expensive than earlier plans. For the location, there are several convenience store nearby, a Donki Hotte few minutes by walk and the monorail station is less than 1 minutes from the hotel. You have also the Naha Bus Terminal on the next monorail station to go to different places to the island and the center of the town is only 2 monorail stations from here. 

We are looking forward to seeing you again on your next stay in Okinawa. 

 Best Regards, 

Mercure Okinawa Naha
Front Office Team.

Cons: Rooms are abit too small for comfort. No separate shower/toilet. Not close to Kokusai-dori. Hotel overall feels a tad old and in need for an upgrade.
reviews.response:
Thank you for staying at Mercure Okinawa Naha and thank you for leaving your thoughts. 
We are happy to know that you found the location convenient to reach but we regret that you did not feel so close to the downtown area. 
We are glad that you appreciated our hotel Breakfast. 
However, we are sorry that you found that the room was a bit small.  You may know that you can upgrade your room for a bigger size depending on our rooms availability, therefore please feel free to ask our staff about this next time you stay at our hotel. We are also sorry that our bathroom does not operating separatly for the toilets.
Thank you again for sharing your experience, and we hope to see you again at Mercure Okinawa Naha.

reviews.text: If you are staying here, the main advantage is the train station and family mart right at the door step. The staff was unnecessary rude and i was puzzled if it was because we are a mixed race couple. They did not understand seem to understand a single English word spoken and refused friends from visiting our rooms and that we have to stay in the lobby to chat? The car rental service is in the same location but in order to return the car the next morning, we have to pay for the parking fee as well? I will not return to this hotel again.

reviews.title: Only if u r going to rent an OTS car
reviews.text:
The location is perfect, next to the train giving u accessibility to most places in Naha. The OTS car rental has a counter at the hotel lobby making it very convenient to rent and return a car. 

HOWEVER, when u have to park the car to return the next morning, you have to pay a mandatory 1000 yen for the night as apparently OTS has no parking lots allocated for u and u have to use the hotel automated lot - frustrating and highly disappointing. You are better off to just return the car at the latest time on the same day rather than park even though there is a no extra fee on OTS side when returned before 8am the following day (for full day rental).

We are a mixed couple and the staff looked at us strangely, answered our questions in the most emotionless way u can ever imagined. No one helped us with our luggage, we were not allowed to invite a friend to the room?!?!?!? Seriously, we are asked to talk in the lobby. 

Horrible service - but rooms are all right.

reviews.title: Hotel right beside monorail station
reviews.text:
Our scheduled flights to and from Okinawa were in the early morning and therefore we couldn’t pick up a rental car from the airport, but I was glad the hotel is right beside the monorail station and this gave us the option of picking up the car from another location without having to drag around our luggages too much. 
Hotel rooms are small but still larger than the ones we stayed in other parts of Japan. Attractions within Naha can be easily reached by monorail.

Thank you very much for staying at Mercure Okinawa Naha.  We appreciate the time you took to write a review for us.  However, we are sorry that we gave given a low floor room right next to house keeping .You already know that we can change your room, and we are happy to know that you felt comfortable after room change.
We thank you again for taking your time to share your feedback. We look forward to welcoming you back in the future.

reviews.title: Nice hotel, little overrated.
reviews.text:
Located right next to a monorail station, easy access to and from the airport. Room was decently sized for one person, however my companions (who were sharing a room between two people) had the same size room with two beds squeezed in. Room was sweltering hot, even turning on air-con didn't do much to relieve it. 
Even though Okinawa is an island, most beaches are privately owned, and this hotel is nowhere near any public beaches. Good hotel for business, not so good for tourists.

reviews.title: Top accessibility to the airport 👍 A hotel that's convenient for car rentals.
reviews.text:
It was really convenient to be close to the airport, and there were convenience stores and Don Quijote nearby, which made it easy to buy what we needed. It was especially convenient to be able to rent and return cars on the first floor of the hotel. On the first day, we explored the International Street, and the next day, it was a great location for traveling after renting a car.

The breakfast had a variety of options and overall was satisfying.

However, I was a bit disappointed that when checking in, they did not properly confirm whether breakfast was requested, and I was informed as if it was not included. Also, there were quite a few Chinese tourist groups, so it felt somewhat crowded.

Overall, it was a satisfying accommodation in terms of location and convenience. 👍

reviews.title: Can be better
reviews.text:
>The location, service, and rooms are nearly perfect. However, there are a few aspects that were quite disappointing.
 First, it was extremely bizarre to find that this hotel does not provide body lotion. I even called the front desk to double-check, and they confirmed that they simply do not offer it. As a loyal Accor member, this is the first time I have encountered such a situation, and it doesn't match the brand's usual standards.
 Furthermore, it is a bit of a pity that the hotel does not have a gym. Lastly, I requested an extra pillow, but it had a strange, radish-like smell, which was quite off-putting. For a hotel of this caliber, I expected much better quality control.

reviews.title: Hotel is next to monorail station that goes to airport
reviews.text: The best part about this hotel is the location. It’s next to the monorail station and makes getting to airport easy the interior of the hotel is old but still decently clean. Water dispenser and ice machine are available on every floor. The minus point is that there is not many restaurants around the hotel. Only convenience stores. We drove a Toyota harrier during the trip and it’s too big for the hotel car park. We ended up in the next door multi storey public carpark.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 
Greetings from Mercure Hotel Okinawa Naha. 
Thank you for taking some of your time for this review. 
We can help you to have some recommended places to eat by coming to the reception. We have also a map of the Neiborhood of the hotel with place to eat and useful shops nearby.  
We are looking forward to seeing you again with us. 
Best Regards, 

Mercure Okinawa Front Office Team.

It is always a pleasure to receive positive feedback. I will share your comments with our team. Mercue Hotel Okinawa Front Staff

If not, it's also convenient to take the monorail located next to the hotel (4-5 stops) to the airport if you are not travelling with the elderly or young children.
reviews.response:
Thank you for staying at Mercure Okinawa Naha and thank you for leaving a comment.
We are happy to know that you found the location of our hotel convenient. 
Also,We are happy to hear that you were satisfied by our hotel, and we are glad to know that you felt comfortable while staying at our hotel.We hope to see you again the next time you are in Okinawa. 
By the way, the monorail is just next to our hotel and it directs to the airport. That's why we are not providing shuttle service to the airport. Thanks for your understanding.
We hope to serve you next time as well.

Nice, newly-built business hotel, pretty clean and tidy. 
Small room, but quite decent by Japanese standards. Bathroom is better and bigger than the usual plastic cubicle in Japanese business hotels.
Not in the city centre, but not far from it. Monorail station right in front of the hotel, the main bus terminal is about 5mins on foot (not that I'd recommend taking buses in Okinawa-they're ridiculously expensive and slow, renting a car is a must), Kokusai-dori (the main street) is 10-15mins, or 5-10 mins by the monorail.
Staff speaks good English, and by good I mean good by international standards, superb by Japanese standards.
Overall, very good value for money, but not a good choice for those who'd like to enjoy the beaches and scenery of Okinawa (for that, book a resort hotel outside Naha).

reviews.title: Clean hotel with friendly staff
reviews.text:
Easy access to train station, it is literally just downstairs of the hotel. This hotel features a lift-style car park where you conveniently drive your car inside the lift and at the press of a few buttons the lift parks your car for you. OTS car rental service is also available within the hotel, free iMac computers for you to browse in the lobby.

Rooms are probably considered not overly small by Japanese standard but the soundproofing of the windows are a bit poor, you can hear slight whistling noise at night when the wind gets blowing.

All in all quite a neat hotel though lacks a bit in the facilities department.
reviews.positives: Good service, friendly staff, clean environment

reviews.title: Good access and beautiful.
reviews.text: Used for a family trip. We arrived in Naha on the last flight, and since we had children, we wanted to stay close to the Yui Rail. The check-in was smooth, there were three elevators, and the room was clean, allowing us to refresh our tired bodies for the next day. Although we could see the Yui Rail, it is a monorail, so there was no noise, and it didn’t bother us. The breakfast buffet had a wide variety of options, and we ate too much. However, I thought the breakfast restaurant might be a bit small for the size of the hotel. We were able to enter smoothly, but it might be a wait if it gets crowded. We didn’t use it this time, but there was also a rental car service available. We could easily walk to Kokusai Street and the station is right in front so it’s quick to take the Yui Rail and also easy to return to the airport.

reviews.text: I enjoyed my stay at Mercure Okinawa Naha. I was there in Naha for a conference. The location was excellent, just in front of the monorail station. The staff was very kind and friendly and the room very neat and cozy.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you very much for staying at Mercure Okinawa Naha. We are happy to know that you found the location of our hotel convenient. It’s wonderful to know that the nearby 7-11, FamilyMart, Don Quijote, and various supermarkets added to your convenience during your stay. The convenience of having the Tsubogawa Station right at our doorstep undoubtedly facilitates seamless exploration of downtown Naha and its surrounding attractions.

Thanks for considering our hard working staff and we ensure you that we will do our utmost efforts to keep our service standards high. We hope to see you again the next time you are in Okinawa. Thank you very much for choosing Mercure Hotel.

Mercure Hotel Okinawa Naha 
Front Office Staff
